title: Getting Started
seoTitle: Game Of Darts Getting Started | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to set up your first Game Of Darts match, add players, choose a game mode, enter scores, and review your results.
summary: Create your players, choose a game mode, start your match, and begin enjoying everything Game Of Darts has to offer.

sections.heading: Start Your First Match
paragraphs: Getting started is quick and easy. Add your players, choose the game mode you'd like to play, review the available options, and begin your match.

As you play, Game Of Darts guides you through score entry for each game mode. Once the match is complete, you can review your statistics, compare leaderboard positions, and continue improving your game.
bullets: Quick Start 501 lets you begin a traditional X01 match in seconds.
Sign in to Apple Game Center to unlock achievements and compete on leaderboards.
Supported player information and statistics automatically sync across your devices when you're connected.

sections.heading: Playing Online and Offline
paragraphs: When you're connected to the internet, Game Of Darts can synchronise player data, statistics, and Game Center progress across supported devices.

Most features continue to work offline, allowing you to enjoy your matches even without an internet connection. Online services such as Game Center and cloud synchronisation will become available again automatically when you reconnect.

images.caption: Everything you need to get started with Game Of Darts.
